name: personal-expense-tracker
description: Production-grade personal expense tracker with real authentication, database persistence, analytics, exports, budgets, and spending insights.

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace apps/api & npm run dev --workspace apps/web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace apps/api && npm run build --workspace apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace apps/api && npm run typecheck --workspace apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace apps/api && npm run lint --workspace apps/web
